description: User hovers over the 'Leaving From' input field, which is pre-filled with 'Maroochydore, Australia - Sunshine Coast'.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for going places
frame_description: The Webjet homepage is visible with a flight search form on the right side. The 'Leaving From' and 'Going To' fields are already populated.

description: User switches browser tabs to the 'Askable Sessions' page.
frame_description: The screen changes to the Askable Sessions dashboard showing task instructions.

description: User switches back to the Webjet flight search tab.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for going places
frame_description: The Webjet homepage search form is visible again.

description: User hovers over the 'Select Travel Dates' field, appearing to review the form before proceeding.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for going places
frame_description: The cursor remains stationary over the date selection area of the search widget.

description: User clicks on the 'Select Travel Dates' input field to open the calendar.
page_title: Webjet | Your go-to for going places
frame_description: The user activates the date picker.

description: The date picker modal overlay appears on the screen.
frame_description: A calendar modal showing February and March 2026 opens over the search form.

description: User hovers over various dates in the March 2026 calendar view.
frame_description: The cursor moves across the calendar grid.

description: User selects March 1, 2026, as the departure date.
frame_description: The date March 1st is highlighted in the calendar.

description: User hovers over dates in late March to choose a return flight.
frame_description: The cursor moves toward the end of the March calendar grid.

description: User selects March 22, 2026, as the return date.
frame_description: The date March 22nd is highlighted, and the range between the two dates is shaded.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button in the date picker modal.
frame_description: The user confirms their date selection.
The calendar overlay disappears, showing the updated search form with selected dates.
The user initiates the search process.

description: A loading screen with a flight path animation is displayed.
frame_description: The screen shows an animation of a plane moving from Maroochydore to London with the text 'Available airfares will be displayed shortly'.

description: The browser navigates to the flight search results page.
frame_description: The URL changes and the results page begins to render.

description: User scrolls down the results page to view different flight options.
frame_description: The user moves the page content vertically to see more flight cards.
